prerequisites: An Uptick account with API access enabled. Uptick is fire protection and field service management software; contact your Uptick account representative if you do not have access.
The base URL of your Uptick API instance, supplied as the required base_url config field.
OAuth2 client credentials (client_id and client_secret) issued for your Uptick instance.
A valid Uptick user login (username and password) authorized to access the data you want to extract.

authMethods.name: OAuth2 password (resource owner) credentials
authMethods.summary: Uptick authenticates with an OAuth2 password grant. You supply all four credentials together: the OAuth client_id and client_secret issued for your instance, plus the username and password of an authorized Uptick user. The connector exchanges these for an access token against the API at the configured base_url. client_id, client_secret, and password are stored as secrets; username is stored as plain config.

setupSteps.title: Confirm Uptick API access and base URL
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Uptick instance (for example via dashboard.uptick.com) and confirm your account has API access. Determine the base URL of your API instance; you will enter it as the required base_url field. If you are unsure whether API access is enabled, contact your Uptick account representative.

setupSteps.title: Obtain OAuth client credentials
setupSteps.body: Get the OAuth2 client_id and client_secret issued for your Uptick instance from your Uptick administrator or account representative. Both are required and are stored as secrets.

setupSteps.title: Provide a user login
setupSteps.body: Supply the username and password of an Uptick user authorized to read the data you intend to extract. The username is stored as plain config; the password is stored as a secret.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter base_url, client_id, client_secret, username, and password into the connector configuration. All five fields are required. On connection, these credentials are exchanged for an access token used to call the Uptick API.
